approved_command_preview: Run the existing reusable Airtable database health export operator tool against only Work Items. This uses operator_tools/github_desktop_lane/scripts/New-DcoirAirtableDatabaseHealthExport.ps1 and Dcoir.Airtable instead of ad hoc Invoke-RestMethod code. Read-only bounded record export, MaxRecordsPerTable 1, MetadataScope All, ProbeUnsupportedMetadata, TableList Work Items, NoZip. No Airtable writes, no deletes, no schema changes, no source/skill/workflow changes beyond this request file.
